title: Review and fix security issues in authentication module
instruction: Review user_auth.py for security issues and fix them. The tests in test_user_auth.py will verify your fixes. Issues to fix: (1) Passwords stored in plain text - use proper hashing with salt, (2) Hardcoded secret key - use environment variable, (3) No input validation, (4) Change password doesn't verify old password, (5) Delete user doesn't verify password, (6) Session tokens are predictable, (7) No rate limiting on login. Fix all issues to make the tests pass.
difficulty_rationale: Requires finding and correcting security and correctness issues in an unfamiliar module.
